indexes._comment: wisdom_base: gemini_brain._fetch_wisdom — МОЗГ retrieves country-specific facts ordered by recency. Two query patterns share this index: country=<iso2> AND country='any'.
wikivoyage_base: МОЗГ wiki-fallback (anticipated, after feat/mozg-wiki-fallback merges). Same pattern as wisdom_base but sorted by importedAt (wiki has no createdAt).

telegram_queue: channel_poster._load_recent_posted_countries — reads the last N posted docs to seed rotation. NOTE: channel field path is hardcoded because Firestore doesn't support wildcards in nested map fields. If a new posting channel is added (e.g. @another_channel), add a parallel index with that channel's _channel_field_safe value.
